default.title: Horizon Tech | Software na Kasuwanci, girgije da AI
default.description: Horizon Tech yana tsarawa da isar da software na kasuwanci, mafita na AI, kayan aikin girgije, da samfuran dijital don ƙungiyoyi masu son zuciya.

home.title: Horizon Tech | Engineering Systems That Scale
home.description: Software na kasuwanci, AI / ML, kayan aikin girgije, da isar da IoT don ƙungiyoyin duniya.

about.title: Game da Horizon Tech | Manufa da Ƙungiyar Kamfanin
about.description: Koyi game da Horizon Tech, manufarmu, da kuma yadda muke isar da mafita na fasaha mai tasiri.

team.title: Tawagar | Jagorancin Horizon Tech da Masana
team.description: Saduwa da injiniyoyi da shugabannin da ke gina software na kasuwanci da dandamali na girgije a Horizon Tech.

careers.title: Ayyuka | Gina tare da Horizon Tech
careers.description: Bincika matsayi mai buɗewa kuma haɓaka aikinku tare da ƙungiyar injiniyoyi ta Horizon Tech.

contact.title: Tuntuɓi Horizon Tech | Fara aikinku
contact.description: Tuntuɓi Horizon Tech don tattauna aikinku, buƙatun fasaha, da jadawalin isarwa.

caseStudies.title: Case Studies | Sakamakon Horizon Tech
caseStudies.description: Karanta nazarin shari'ar abokin ciniki da sakamakon da Horizon Tech ya bayar a duk faɗin masana'antu.

blog.title: Blog | Horizon Tech Insights
blog.description: Fahimtar fasaha, darussan bayarwa, da jagorancin gine-gine daga Horizon Tech.

education.title: Ilimi | Horizon Tech Learning Resources
education.description: Jagora, nassoshi, da albarkatun ilmantarwa na fasaha daga Horizon Tech.

support.title: Support | Horizon Tech
support.description: Samu albarkatun tallafi da zaɓuɓɓukan tuntuɓar don sabis na Horizon Tech.

privacy.title: Manufofin Tsare Sirri | Horizon Tech
privacy.description: Karanta manufofin tsare sirri na Horizon Tech da alkawuran kariya na bayanai.

terms.title: Sharuɗɗan Sabis | Horizon Tech
terms.description: Karanta sharuɗɗan sabis na Horizon Tech don gidan yanar gizon mu da ayyukanmu.

profile.title: Profile | Horizon Tech
profile.description: Sarrafa bayanan Horizon Tech ɗinku, saituna, da bayanan asusu.

firstTimeSetup.title: Saitin Farko | Horizon Tech
firstTimeSetup.description: Kammala saitin asusun farko don ci gaba a cikin Horizon Tech.

forgotPassword.title: Manta Kalmar sirri | Horizon Tech
forgotPassword.description: Sake saita damar zuwa asusunka na Horizon Tech.

resetPassword.title: Sake saita kalmar sirri | Horizon Tech
resetPassword.description: Ƙirƙiri sabuwar kalmar sirri don asusunka na Horizon Tech.

confirmEmail.title: Tabbatar da imel | Horizon Tech
confirmEmail.description: Tabbatar da adireshin imel ɗinka don kunna asusunka na Horizon Tech.

admin.title: Admin Panel | Horizon Tech
admin.description: Gudanar da wurin aiki don gudanar da dandamali na Horizon Tech.

unauthorized.title: Ba tare da izini ba | Horizon Tech
unauthorized.description: A halin yanzu ba ka da damar shiga wannan shafin na Horizon Tech.

services.title: Ayyuka | Horizon Tech
services.description: Bincika sabis na Horizon Tech a cikin injiniyan software, AI, girgije, DevOps, da canjin dijital.

innovationLab.title: Innovation Lab | Horizon Tech
innovationLab.description: Duba gwaje-gwajen Horizon Tech da samfurori a cikin AI da aikin injiniya.

authCallback.title: Shiga | Horizon Tech
authCallback.description: Kammala amintaccen shiga don asusunku na Horizon Tech.
